# YOUR CODE HERE
def main():
    import sys
    input = sys.stdin.read
    data = input().split()
    
    index = 0
    N = int(data[index])
    index += 1
    P = list(map(int, data[index:index + N]))
    index += N
    Q = int(data[index])
    index += 1
    queries = []
    for _ in range(Q):
        A = int(data[index])
        B = int(data[index + 1])
        queries.append((A, B))
        index += 2
    
    pos = {person: i + 1 for i, person in enumerate(P)}
    
    for A, B in queries:
        if pos[A] < pos[B]:
            print(A)
        else:
            print(B)

if __name__ == "__main__":
    main()
